dict.string: Jarvis needs microphone access to record your voice for dictation and AI commands.
Jarvis needs screen capture access for Vision mode to analyze what's on your screen.
Jarvis uses on-device speech recognition to show a live preview of what you're saying in the HUD. No audio leaves your Mac for this preview.
Jarvis uses your location to show weather for your area in Uptodate mode. You can also set a city manually in Settings if you prefer.
Jarvis shows your next calendar event as a tile in the Cockpit panel. Access is read-only.
Jarvis shows your next calendar event as a tile in the Cockpit panel. Access is read-only.
Jarvis shows Bluetooth connectivity and connected devices in the Cockpit Handlinger tile. No data is sent anywhere.
